title: Savory Fluffy White Bread Stir-fry
description: A lazy-sunday Indian-inspired dish featuring white bread that's been blanched and paired with diabetic-friendly ingredients for a flavorful breakfast option.
instructions: Preheat oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Blanch the white bread in boiling water for about 1 minute, then drain and chop into small pieces.
Add chopped onions to the hot pan and sauté until translucent, about 2-3 minutes.
Fold in blanched bread chunks, ginger garlic paste, coriander powder, turmeric powder, and salt. Stir well.
Sauté for an additional 1-2 minutes or until bread is crispy but not burnt.
Remove from heat and serve warm with a side of yogurt or as a topper for paratha.
